text: As I move between these spaces, I feel suspended between parallel realms of potential. The first is sterile and empty, almost anticipatory – it invites contemplation and the kind of quiet unease that comes from possibility yet unrealized. The second is vibrant, full of color and text, preaching progress and collaboration. Here, I sense curiosity and urgency to engage, to question, to create meaning among signs, screens, and diagrams. In both, I am reminded how environments sculpt thought: calm in one, stimulated in the other – perpetually an observer, ever questioning my place within these ever-shifting domains.
